3076990.name: Dungeon Werewolf
3076990.description:
Can you survive this dungeon…?!
Seek the sacred treasure to save the town!!
A new social deduction game begins!
Up to 20 players & over 60 roles! Unleash your hidden abilities now!!

■ Over 60 Roles! Lead your faction to victory with unique abilities!

◇ Villager Faction
Villager, Twins, Whisper Twins, Bell Maker, Invisible Man, Graveyard Priest, Assassin, Spirit Cat, Queen, Princess, Cursed, Wolf Killer, Shaman, Mayor, Holy Elder, Wolf Cursed, Leader, Gambler, Wander Monk, Paladin, Police Dog, Parrot, Insect

◇ Werewolf Faction
Werewolf, Rampage Wolf, Swallow Wolf, Voodoo Wolf, Berserk Wolf, Sniper Wolf, Werewolf King, Shapeshifter Wolf, Two-Head Wolf, Invisible Wolf, Insight Wolf, Jester Wolf, Lone Wolf, Alpha Wolf, Wolf Follower, Wolf Whisperer, Psycho, Black Cat, Poison Spider, Dark Gambler, Scavenger, Corrupt Politico

◇ Fox Spirit Faction, Zombie Faction, Other Factions
Fox Spirit, Nine-Tailed Fox, Fox Follower, Fox Zealot, Fox Whisperer, Lovers, Cupid, Femme Fatale, Zombie, Zombie Fanatic, Zombie Doctor, Ghoul, Thief, Pure Lover, Avenger, Santa, Drunkard, Misfortune, Telepath, and more.

■ Explore the vast 3D dungeons beneath the ruins!
Move your character and explore the werewolf-infested dungeon to seek the ""Sacred Bell"".
Your actions during exploration will serve as an alibi, providing crucial clues during discussions.
The dungeon types are 'Nether Altar', 'Desert Maze', 'Sky Garden', and 'Inferno Cave'!
Explore the dungeon and find the ""Sacred Bell""!

■ Control your favorite characters!
Familiar characters from ""Werewolf Judgment"" become mini characters that you can freely explore the dungeon with.
You can also freely customize their outfits and play with your own unique coordination.

Outfits can be restricted depending on the room settings.
■ Game System
◇ Up to 20 players
You can play with 4 to 20 players.

The maximum number of players (20) is calculated based on the estimated message traffic per room. If the traffic exceeds expectations, the maximum number of players may be reduced to ensure server stability. Thank you for your understanding.
◇ Preset chat messages & stamps
In addition to regular chat, you can use commonly used preset chat messages.

◇ Voice stamps to enhance the excitement!
You can send voice stamps to your opponents, in addition to regular messages.
Express your feelings with stamps that match the situation.

■ Three Game Modes
You can play online with 4 to 20 players in three game modes: ""Public Match"", ""Private Match"", and ""Friend Match"".

Performance may vary depending on other players' device specifications and network speed. Thank you for your understanding.
◇ Public Match (Online)
Compete against players nationwide. Playing Public Matches adds ranking points, allowing you to compete with players across the nation.

◇ Friend Match (Online)
Play against nearby friends or registered players.

Play with a password
You can play with a password set by friends.

Play with registered friends
You can play against players registered as friends.

－－－－－－－－－－

■ Story
It is said that collecting the ""Sacred Bell"" from the ruins can drive away the werewolves that plague the town.
Villagers suffering from werewolf attacks have come to seek the ""Sacred Bell"".
However, werewolves have already infiltrated their ranks!

Explore the dungeon and find the ""Sacred Bell""!
But be cautious...
Werewolves are lurking among the explorers, ready to attack!

Identify the werewolves through discussions and execute them by voting!

Can the villagers collect the ""Sacred Bell"" and save the town?
Or will the werewolves annihilate all the villagers?
The survival game between werewolves and villagers begins now!

－－－－－－－－－－

Requests *
For any issues, please contact us through our website or the ""Contact Us"" section in the game.
We may not be able to address issues mentioned in reviews due to lack of information.
We strive to incorporate customer feedback to make the game more enjoyable, and we appreciate your cooperation.
